name: Context Guardian Runtime
description: Hook-only runtime plugin for context-guardian adapter-backed continuity.

enabled.label: Enable Context Guardian Runtime
enabled.help: Enable native OpenClaw hook integration that calls the external context-guardian adapter CLI.

adapterRoot.label: Adapter Root Path
adapterRoot.help: Persistent storage root used by the context-guardian adapter. Keep this outside package directories.

taskIdPrefix.label: Task ID Prefix
taskIdPrefix.help: Prefix used when deriving durable task ids from session keys.

criticalThreshold.label: Critical Threshold
criticalThreshold.help: Pressure threshold at or above which the plugin checkpoints and requests approval before destructive exec calls.

guardExec.label: Guard Exec
guardExec.help: When true, exec tool calls receive checkpoint/approval guard behavior.

prependGuidance.label: Prompt Guidance
prependGuidance.help: Inject concise continuity guidance into prompt space using before_prompt_build.
